evidence_quotes.quote: rules about publishers ending games that I have bought.
end of life scenarios for games by the publishers.

If I bought a game, it's unfair that in a couple of years I wouldn't be able to play said game because the publisher only thinks about their income and not about making sure I as a consumer have the option to (in a deminished way) play the game I bought.

paragraphs.text: This is a great initiative! But could I as a Dutch citizen please ask if you can broaden this initiative to also include rules about publishers ending games that I have bought. Please make additions about end of life scenarios for games by the publishers. If I bought a game, it's unfair that in a couple of years I wouldn't be able to play said game because the publisher only thinks about their income and not about making sure I as a consumer have the option to (in a deminished way) play the game I bought.
